name: @claw-kit/codex-adapter
description: Codex adapter assets for landing the claw-kit .claw workflow inside Codex.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.codex-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('hooks/hooks.json','utf8')); console.log('plugin manifest and hooks config ok')"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @veewo/claw-core && npm run build -w @veewo/claw && node --test hooks/*.test.mjs
